issues.description: Missing condition for optional return of DON!! cards. Text states 'You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck' - this is a prerequisite/cost that must be modeled as a condition or separate action before the AttachDon occurs.
AttachDon action is incomplete. Must specify that cards being attached are 'rested' (status/state), and the return of DON!! cards from field to deck is missing entirely.
Count should be 'up to 2' (variable), not fixed 2. Should use 'upTo' or similar notation if DSL supports it.
Target is correct (Leader or Character), but missing the constraint that only rested DON!! can be selected/attached.
